name: Febrianto Aji
description: Dedicated and dynamic Electrical Engineering student with a strong passion for robotics, automation, and embedded systems. Possessing a solid academic foundation complemented by hands-on experience in developing various engineering projects, ranging from autonomous robot navigation to smart environmental monitoring systems. Highly skilled in hardware-software integration with core expertise in microcontrollers, Internet of Things (IoT) architectures, Programmable Logic Controllers (PLC), and programming (C/C++, Python). Adept at applying theoretical knowledge to practical solutions, including sensor integration for signal measurement and motor control design. Seeking a challenging internship or entry-level position to leverage technical proficiency and enthusiasm for innovation in impactful real-world engineering projects.
